## Summary

What does this PR change, and why?

## Testing

How was this verified? Tick what you ran locally:

- [ ] `make lint`
- [ ] `make type-check`
- [ ] `make test`
- [ ] `make eval-sample` (if retrieval/eval changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] Code follows the existing style (typed, concise)
- [ ] Tests added or updated for the change
- [ ] Benchmark numbers / paper tables regenerated if results changed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or interfaces changed
